plugins.name: OpenCode Go
plugins.description: OpenCode Go provider for CLIProxyAPI. Serves the 22 low-cost OpenCode Go coding models (kimi, grok, deepseek, glm, minimax, qwen, mimo, hy3) using an OpenCode Go API key. Declares auth_provider + model_provider; upstream calls ride the host's built-in OpenAI-compatible executor.
plugins.author: pragmaticgrowth

plugins.name: Warp AI
plugins.description: Warp AI provider for CLIProxyAPI. Spend your Warp subscription credits (Claude, GPT, Gemini, and Fireworks-hosted models) from any entry protocol. Declares auth_provider + executor + model_registrar + command_line_plugin; bridges Warp's protobuf-over-HTTP/2 backend (app.warp.dev/ai/multi-agent) to chat-completions. Firebase-OAuth credential (refresh token) imported via `--warp-login`. Unofficial, unsupported integration.
plugins.author: pragmaticgrowth
